dead.quote: It was really hard to be cast out as a prophet. I felt like the table overreacted and misread my signals on a few key turns.

winners.quote: I stayed calm as a werewolf and let the deck crumble in the direction I wanted. The werewolf camp ended perfectly.
I survived until the end, riding on the countertop trend. After the pressure shifted to PHD, I knew that the werewolf camp had the upper hand.
I survived until the end, riding on the countertop trend. After the pressure shifted to PHD, I knew that the werewolf camp had the upper hand.

losers.quote: I lost this game as a bandit. Too much energy on the countertop was absorbed by the PHD, and my judgment failed to recover it.
I lost this game as a villager. Too much energy on the countertop was absorbed by the PHD, and my judgment failed to recover it.
